query:legal_move_count.capture_rule_text: A jump captures one adjacent opponent piece and lands on the empty square beyond.
query:legal_move_count.single_jump_rule_text: Count only one jump per move; ignore follow-up jumps.
query:legal_move_count.legal_move_rule_text: A landing square is the empty square where a piece ends after exactly one move. Include simple diagonal steps and capture jumps.
query:legal_move_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space square boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every legal landing square; use an empty array if none are available
query:legal_move_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count of legal landing squares

query:capture_move_count.capture_rule_text: A jump captures one adjacent opponent piece and lands on the empty square beyond.
query:capture_move_count.single_jump_rule_text: Count only one jump per move; ignore follow-up jumps.
query:capture_move_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space square boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every capture landing square; use an empty array if none are available
query:capture_move_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count of capture landing squares

query:piece_with_legal_move_count.capture_rule_text: A jump captures one adjacent opponent piece and lands on the empty square beyond.
query:piece_with_legal_move_count.single_jump_rule_text: Count only one jump per move; ignore follow-up jumps.
query:piece_with_legal_move_count.legal_move_rule_text: A landing square is the empty square where a piece ends after exactly one move. Include simple diagonal steps and capture jumps.
query:piece_with_legal_move_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space piece boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every current-player piece with at least one legal move; use an empty array if none are available
query:piece_with_legal_move_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of current-player pieces with at least one legal move

query:piece_with_capture_move_count.capture_rule_text: A jump captures one adjacent opponent piece and lands on the empty square beyond.
query:piece_with_capture_move_count.single_jump_rule_text: Count only one jump per move; ignore follow-up jumps.
query:piece_with_capture_move_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space piece boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every current-player piece with at least one capture jump; use an empty array if none are available
query:piece_with_capture_move_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of current-player pieces with at least one capture jump

query:max_capture_chain_length.capture_rule_text: A jump captures one adjacent opponent piece and lands on the empty square beyond.
query:max_capture_chain_length.king_chain_rule_text: The outlined checker is a king; it may capture diagonally in any direction, remove the jumped piece, and continue jumping from each landing square while another capture is available.
query:max_capture_chain_length.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space piece boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the opponent pieces captured along the longest chain
query:max_capture_chain_length.answer_hint: set "answer" to the maximum number of opponent pieces the marked king can capture in one continuous jump chain

query:piece_state_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a JSON array of pixel-space piece boxes [x0, y0, x1, y1] for every piece requested in the question; use an empty array if none are present
query:piece_state_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the number of pieces requested in the question

object_description.description: Prompt-facing description of the sampled Checkers board density.

current_player_name.description: Prompt-facing name of the side to move.

movement_rule_text.description: Prompt-facing direction convention for ordinary Checkers pieces.
